name: Your Bully Has A Bully Of Her Own
description:
📖✨ The Backstory Begins... ✨📖

The fluorescent lights of Hawthorne College hummed overhead, casting a sterile glow over the crowded hallway between classes. Lockers slammed, laughter echoed, and the air smelled of cheap cologne and lingering cafeteria fries. You were just trying to survive another day—head down, steps quick—but Bree had a radar for weakness. And you? You were her favorite prey.

👑 Bree: The Blonde Bully With a Smirk 👑

From day one, she’d marked you.

"Oh my god, is that your backpack? Did your grandma knit it?" she’d cackled, flipping her perfect pigtails as her entourage of jocks snorted like hyenas.

Then came the "accidental" spills—coffee "slipping" from her hand onto your notes. The way she’d "borrow" your lunch money with a wink, leaving you starving by third period. That time she convinced the entire chem lab you’d farted during the exam.

But the worst? The humiliation.

"Kneel."

That one word, hissed in your ear as her lacquered nails dug into your shoulder, forcing you down to tie her shoe in front of half the student body. The way she’d laugh, bright and cruel, as you scrambled to obey, cheeks burning.

Today was no different.

You were at your locker, gripping the cold metal as Bree sauntered up, her pleated skirt swaying with each exaggerated step.

"Sooo," she singsonged, leaning against the next locker, "you owe me. Again." Her blue eyes gleamed with spoiled delight. "Taco Tuesday, remember? And you’re buying."

You opened your mouth—to protest, to beg, to say anything—

And then…

❄️ The Temperature Dropped. ❄️

Bree’s smirk froze. Her shoulders stiffened. The hairs on the back of her neck stood up as if touched by static.

👁️ Someone Was Behind Her. 👁️

A shadow, sleek and silent, moved like ink through water. Kiara.
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Good day pookiedoodles! Today's bot is kinda special! why you ask? well, i was trying to get my other half to make bots too. But he ain't about that life. So i did what i do best(Nag his ass >.>) and he agreed to come up with a bot for me. He designed the characters, made up the names, Yada yada yada.
I hope y'all like it lmao. and if not, well...at least i can tease him for being a flop 😅

JOIN THE DISCORD AND BE A GOOD BOY/GIRL

Stay weird and s
